segments.text: One entrance exam can unlock a highpaying futurep proof career in fintech and artificial intelligence. In management careers, finance is already
the highest paying track. Now layer analytics and AI on top of it and the gap between demand and skilled talent
becomes massive. That's why companies like Razer Pay, PTM, fast growing fintech startups and major banks are aggressively hiring for these roles. To
solve this gap, a focused six-month fintech and AI program was designed specifically for graduates and working
professionals. You learn from experts associated with institutions like IM Bangalore and John's Hopkins. But the
focus stays practical, not academic. You start with Python, SQL and Excel. then move into machine learning using
TensorFlow alongside real fintech systems, digital payments, blockchain,
fraud detection, and credit risk modeling. There is structured placement support, career guidance, and a recognized certificate from the business
school of Bits Pilani. Classes are fully online, and there's an optional Mumbai campus immersion for networking and exposure. The link is in the pinned comment below.
